briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
This macro enables the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the encrypted enabled state of the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

simplesect.para: TRUE if HDCP22 cipher is enabled, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the HDCP operation mode for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro sets the HDCP RX operation mode for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro enables HDCP TX encryption for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables HDCP TX encryption for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the encrypted enabled state of HDCP TX encryption for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

simplesect.para: TRUE if HDCP22 TX encryption is enabled, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the encrypted state for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

simplesect.para: TRUE if the frame is encrypted, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This macro enables or disables noise output for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE either to enable/disable noise output.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XHdcp22Cipher_Noise(u32 BaseAddress, u8 Set)

briefdescription.para: This macro enables or disables blank screen for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.
specifies TRUE/FALSE either to enable/disable blank screen.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XHdcp22Cipher_Blank(u32 BaseAddress, u8 Set)

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the version for the HDCP22 Cipher peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XHdcp22_Cipher_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xhdcp22_cipher_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the XHDCP22 Cipher core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XHdcp22Cipher_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xhdcp22_cipher_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the HDCP22 Cipher core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the HDCP22 Cipher core. Initialization of the HDCP22 Cipher includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp22_Cipher core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the HDCP22 Cipher core core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if HDCP22 Cipher ID mismatched.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Ks key in the HDCP22 Cipher core.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.
is a pointer to the Ks key.
indicates the number of bytes.

simplesect.para: The Ks should be in big endian notation.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Lc128 key in the HDCP22 Cipher core.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.
is a pointer to the LC128 key.
indicates the number of bytes.

simplesect.para: The Lc128 should be in big endian notation.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the Riv key in the HDCP22 Cipher core.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 Cipher core instance.
is a pointer to the Riv key.
indicates the number of bytes.

simplesect.para: The Riv should be in big endian notation.
